raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un juhs to redsefeet/ un
juhfu Sirds buhs lihafniga/ nn
juhfu Rauli fattohs fa Sable.
Tad taps ta KUNGA Rohka
pasihftana wiffeem faweem Kal-
peem/ nn pahr faweem Eenaid-
neefeem wiꞥſch dusmofees."
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo raugi/ tas KUNGS
nahfs ar Ugguni/ nn winna
Ratti fa Weefulis/ fa tas at-
makta favas Dusmoschanas
Bahrsibâ/ nn lamina ar Ugguns
Leefmahin."
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ar Ugguni teefahs tas
KUNGS/ nn ar favu Sohbinu
wiffu Meeſu/ nn leels Pulks
buhs to Nokauto ta KUNGA."
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kas paschi fwehtijahs/
nn patchi fchbihstahs Dahrsôs
zits pakkat zittu/ nn ehd Zuhko-
Galtu/ nn Negantibu/ nn Bel-
les/ tee taps kohipa isdeldeti/ fat-
ta tas KUNGS."
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo es nahkfchu nn fapul-
zinaschu winnu Darbus/ nn
winnu Dohinas ar wiffeem Pa-
ganeem nn Wallodahm/ nn tee
nahfs/ nn redsehs mannu Goh-
dibu."
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es eezeltschn starp teem
weenii Sihmi/ nn tahfischu no
teem Jozglahbteem (Kahbus) pee
teem Paganeemus Tarsu/ Wu-
lu nn Lindu/ pee teem Stohpu
Streblncekeem/ Tuhbatu nn Ja-
wann/ us tahm tahfs gulla-
mahm Sallahm/ kas mannu
Slawu ne irr dsirdejschi/ nedê"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee atweddihs wiſ
juhſus Brahtus no wiffeem
paneem/ tam KUNGAM
Ehdamo-Uppuri/ us Sirg-
um Ratteem/ un us Schub-
Wahgeem/ un us Sirg-Et-
teem/ un us tschakleem S-
geem/ lihds mannam fweht-
Kalnam us Jerusalemi/ fa-
tas KUNGS: Jtt ka tee If-
efa Behrni Ehdamo-Upp-
schkibsta Tranka nets us
KUNGA Namimu."
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es no teem jeimsc-
zittus par Preestereem/ un p-
Lewiteem/ fatka tas KUNG-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo itt ka tabs jaun
Debbefis/ un ta jauna Semm-
fo es darrischu/ manna Pre-
scha stahwehs/fakka tas KUNG-
Tapatt stahwehs arridsan juh-
Dsimmums un juhfu Wahrs."
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiffa Meeſa nah-
weenu jaunu Mehnefi pakka-
obtru/ un weenu Swehdeen-
pehz ohtras/ nn peeluhgs ma-
nâ Breekfcha/ fatka ta-
KUNGS:"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee isees/ nn redse-
to Zilweku nomirruschas Mee-
jas/ kas prett mann ire pahr-
kahputchi. Jo winan Tahrp-
ne nomirs/ un winnu Uagun-
ne isdsiffihs/ nn tee buhs wiffa-
Meeſai weena Negan-
tiba.
Ta Praweeta Esaijus Gale."
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
